message:
feat(landing): add framer-motion animations with accessibility support

Comprehensive motion upgrade for the landing page, replacing CSS
animations with Framer Motion for smoother, more accessible animations.

AnimatedTerminal component refactored:
- Wrap in motion.div with scale-in entrance animation
- Terminal lines now use motion.div with AnimatePresence
- Cursor visibility animated with motion opacity
- Respects useReducedMotion() hook - shows static content if set
- Uses springs.smooth and springs.snappy from motion presets
- Lines animate with x offset and staggered delays

FeatureCard component enhanced:
- Uses motion.div with fadeUp variant from motion presets
- whileHover animation: y: -4 with glow shadow effect
- Staggered entrance using staggerDelay() utility
- Icon container has scale + rotate hover animation
- Gradient glow orb animated on hover (opacity 0 → 0.3)
- Changed delay prop to index prop for stagger calculation

New FeaturesSection component:
- Extracts feature data into FEATURES constant array
- Uses useScrollReveal hook for scroll-triggered reveal
- Section header fades in when section enters viewport
- Feature grid uses staggerContainer variant for coordination
- Clean separation of data and presentation

FlywheelSection component extracted:
- Similar pattern with scroll-triggered reveal
- Tool icons animate with staggered delays
- Maintains existing visual design

Motion imports added:
- framer-motion: motion, AnimatePresence
- @/components/motion: springs, fadeUp, staggerContainer, scaleIn
- @/lib/hooks/useScrollReveal: useScrollReveal, staggerDelay
- @/lib/hooks/useReducedMotion: useReducedMotion
- React: useRef added for section refs

All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion via useReducedMotion
hook, providing instant display without motion for users who need it.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
